title: layia gaillardioides
intro: Layia gaillardioides, also known as the goldenfields or tickseed, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Layia gaillardioides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
